{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Byron
|pkmn=Steelix (×2)

|type2=Ground

|cap=Byron's Steelix
|epnum=DPA09
|epname=Challenge! The Fortress Of Steel!!
|desc=Byron's two {{p|Steelix}} were used in the challenge in which they served as walls to prevent Hareta from getting to the top. Later, one of the Steelix took on [[Saturn]]'s {{p|Bronzong}} where it was no match for the Bronze Bell Pokémon and was taken out by a single {{m|Solar Beam}}.

None of Steelix's moves are known.}}
